title: Eva Platinium edition Tralier shows the quality of it
display_title: Eva Platinium edition Tralier shows the quality of it
wikitext:
[]: Eva : Platinium edition Tralier ( shows the quality of it)             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jan 10, 2005 3:48 am Here it is on the Adv website http://www.advfilms.com/FILMStrailers.asp#VidArea Enjoy , even though it is old news

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 28, 2005 9:55 pm That trailer is so ludicrous.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Sep 28, 2005 11:32 pm You know what it ludicrous, reviving a old thread that no one posted in and then you post in it 9 MONTHS LATER I thought you would know better, but it seems like you have lost your mind. Either that or some one has hacked your account

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 29, 2005 12:13 am No, I was just replying to some unanswered threads. You know, to bump them.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Sep 29, 2005 12:43 am The Eva Monkey wrote: No, I was just replying to some unanswered threads. You know, to bump them.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 29, 2005 10:55 am You know, a "bump" is a thread revival, to make it noticible, and encourage people to utilize the discussion of a thread that may have gone unnoticed before.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Sep 29, 2005 11:40 am Quality is such a subjective word.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 29, 2005 1:07 pm Touche my good man, touche indeed.
